general.name: Install Island Extension Chrome
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>50FD6AE1-7E05-4079-87BB-4F0105985980</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>50FD6AE1-7E05-4079-87BB-4F0105985980</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Install Island Extension Chrome</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Custom Settings</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>ED5C3DB5-4B9E-4611-9FFC-B58BEE7949A0</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ManagedClient.preferences</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>ED5C3DB5-4B9E-4611-9FFC-B58BEE7949A0</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>com.google.Chrome</key><dict><key>Forced</key><array><dict><key>mcx_preference_settings</key><dict><key>ExtensionInstallForcelist</key><array><string>oedggboaecbkcpnmkmdglidmfblggplg;https://updates.island.io/service/ext?browser_platform=extension&island_tenant_id=neimanmarcus</string></array></dict></dict></array></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>
